Launch Zingtree interactive decision trees from Chrome

Launch Zingtree interactive decision trees from Chrome

The Zingtree Interactive Decision Tree extension for Chrome makes it easy to launch a decision tree from any CRM or Help Desk system. This is extremely useful for internal live support agents in contact centers or similar.

Not only can you give your agents a set of decision tree scripts to follow, but each instance of the script is tied to the active page. So if you have a support ticket or case open, then launch the decision tree, and then come back to that same case or ticket, relaunching the decision tree will resume at the same place previously, and also show the history of what transpired. We call this "Pause and Resume".

You'll need to create your own decision tree scripts to use this extension. Sign up for a free trial at https://zingtree.com

Auto-detects Google Flights and converts to Sabre strings with multi-page merge support.

Sabre Flight Translator (Above9 Internal) is a proprietary productivity tool designed exclusively for travel professionals at Above9 Travel.

Instead of manually typing out flight segments, dates, times, and aircraft equipment codes, this extension seamlessly integrates a translation button directly into the Google Flights interface.

Key Features:

Exclusive Access: Securely locked to authorized @above9.travel email accounts.

One-Click Translation: Automatically reads expanded Google Flight details on your screen.

Accurate Sabre Formatting: Converts departure/arrival times, date crossings, equipment codes, and flight numbers into clean Sabre Sell (0) and VI (vi*) lines.

Auto-Copy: Instantly copies the generated Sabre string to your clipboard for immediate pasting into your GDS terminal.

Note: You must be logged into your Chrome browser with a valid @above9.travel email address for this extension to activate.

Save Time. Stay Compliant.
Loopholes AI scans your text, images, and videos to flag compliance issues in seconds. It’s like having a compliance assistant at your fingertips, literally.

➤ How it Works
Loopholes uses AI to scan your content in real time, including text, images, videos, and audio identifying potential compliance risks before they become problems. As it analyzes your content, our AI flags any issues that may violate brand guidelines, industry regulations, or ad platform policies. Loopholes provides clear, actionable suggestions to help you fix your content quickly. Once you've made the necessary adjustments, you're ready to publish. Avoid rejections, fines, and delays while keeping your workflow smooth and efficient.

➤ How to Get Started
1. Download the Loopholes Extension
2. Pin it to Your Browser – Click the puzzle icon in the top-right corner and select Loopholes.
3. Scan Your Content – Click the extension to check for compliance issues.
4. Fix & Publish – Follow the suggestions to adjust your content and ensure approval.

Shows a notification when text is copied

Have you ever wondered if your Ctrl+C actually worked? Copy Check provides a sleek, non-intrusive notification whenever you copy text, giving you instant confirmation of successful copy actions. With a minimalist design, it shows a subtle confirmation message that smoothly appears and fades away in the bottom-right corner of your screen.

Key Features:
- Instant visual feedback for successful copy actions
- Customizable notification colors with preset themes
- Adjustable opacity for perfect visibility
- Works on any webpage
- Lightweight and resource-efficient

Perfect for writers, developers, students, or anyone who frequently copies text and wants visual confirmation. No more double or triple-pressing Ctrl+C just to be sure! Copy Check runs quietly in the background and only appears when you need it, enhancing your browsing experience without getting in the way.

Note: Only shows notifications when text is actually selected and copied, preventing unnecessary popups.

※ If the notifications are not working properly, please try restarting your browser.
※ All you need to do is sign in and you can use all features for free.

Organize your browser tabs into smart AI-labeled groups, restore instantly, sync securely across devices, even offline.

Chrono Session – AI-Powered Tab Management

Chrono Session is a powerful Browser extension that helps you organize, save, and restore sets of browser tabs (called sessions) using intelligent automation and AI. Designed for researchers, developers, and productivity-driven users, it transforms cluttered browsing into a streamlined workspace.

🔑 Key Features
• Smart Tab Session Management
‣ Save all open tabs instantly as a named session
‣ One-click restore of entire sessions anytime
‣ Offline-first support using local storage

• AI-Powered Organization
‣ Gemini AI generates session titles, descriptions, and thumbnails
‣ Auto-categorization of tabs based on content
‣ Global search across saved sessions and URLs

• Secure Cloud Synchronization
‣ Cross-device sync via encrypted cloud storage (Supabase)
‣ Real-time backup and recovery

• Productivity & Analytics
‣ Visual dashboard with time-based session insights
‣ Tab usage trends, focus metrics, and productivity suggestions

• User-Centric Interface
‣ Clean, modern design with light/dark mode
‣ Customizable views, keyboard shortcuts, and session filters

• Privacy First
‣ End-to-end encrypted cloud sessions
‣ No third-party data sharing or tracking
‣ Full control over your session data

🧠 Why Chrono Session?
Unlike traditional tab managers, Chrono Session uses AI and ML to help you recall, organize, and interact with tab groups more intelligently. You get both speed and context — visual previews, smart search, and natural language session querying.

🚀 How to Get Started
Install the extension

Save tabs using the popup or context menu

Open the dashboard to browse or restore sessions

Enable cloud sync to access sessions anywhere

Let AI organize your work for smarter productivity

For documentation, updates, or support, visit:
🔗 https://chronosession.com

Mio helps you easily and efficiently plan solo and group trips with AI-generated travel itineraries. 

Invite your friends, add your trip details and activities and Mio will generate the most efficient route and itinerary so you and your friends can get the most out of your trip.

You can save whole pages or individual activities and Mio will identify addresses and commute time between each activity. No more manual planning with spreadsheets and searching individual addresses. As new activities get added, Mio will dynamically update the itinerary. 

Customize your itinerary with breaks, food, and more so you can vacation how you want. Get updates and reminders for nearby recommendations or saved activities.

✨ Save time: No more manual searching and planning
✨ Share and customize: Invite friends and make the most out of your vacation
✨ Travel smart: Never miss out on your favorite activities or experiences 

Vacation how you want, doing as little or as much as you'd like. Let Mio make it happen.
Say goodbye to buyer's remorse and hello to smarter, more efficient online shopping!

Say goodbye to buyer's remorse and hello to smarter, more efficient online shopping! 

Enhance your Amazon shopping experience today with the Amazon Review Summarizer Chrome extension. We understand how overwhelming it can be to go through countless reviews while shopping online. Our goal is to save you time, money, and effort by simplifying the process of comparing products and identifying potential red flags. We help you make informed purchasing decisions on Amazon by providing concise and insightful summaries of product reviews. 

Key Features:

Instant Review Summaries: Access succinct and meaningful summaries of customer reviews on any Amazon product page, giving you a quick snapshot of the pros and cons.

Smart Filtering: The extension intelligently filters through thousands of reviews, extracting the most relevant information to help you easily identify common praise and criticism.

User-Friendly Interface: A simple and intuitive design that integrates seamlessly into Amazon product pages, ensuring a smooth and efficient browsing experience.

Compare Products Effortlessly: Make the most of your budget by comparing review summaries of similar products, empowering you to make the best purchase possible.

Save Time and Money: No more sifting through endless reviews or buying products that don't meet your expectations. With our Amazon Review Summarizer, you can confidently shop, knowing you're making well-informed decisions.
Manage your production nifi instances like a pro.

• This extension only works on Nifi instances that are deployed / productionized.

• When a logged-in Nifi instance is opened in the currently active tab, the extension injects a content script in that tab, which retrieves the JWT (JSON Web Token) token and hostname of the Nifi instance from the currently active tab to the extension.

• Then using that token and the instance`s hostname, the extension can retrieve all the process groups present on the Nifi canvas. And they are also cached to view later. Then you can search & sort the fetched process groups based on various filters. You can also bookmark any process group by adding it to the queue. And export the queue as a CSV file.

• Apart from fetching only what is available on the canvas, you can also search for process groups in the whole Nifi instance. And these search results are also cached to be viewed later.

• Once any process group is fetched from canvas/searched for, it will available to be directly searched from chrome`s search bar indefinitely until the extension is uninstalled.

• Anyone working on Nifi 1.13.2 or less can leverage various custom UI components which are directly injected into the Nifi UI. They can help you in enabling/disabling all the controller services at a certain process group level, copy the JWT token using a single click, and back up any of the process groups to your google drive. You can enable any of these custom UI components using the options menu.

• You can read the privacy policy here : https://chiranjeevikarthik.me/Nifi-Utils/privacy.html

• If you face any issues, please raise an issue in the GitHub repository given below.

• The source is available at : https://github.com/karthikchiru12/Nifi-Utils-Chrome-Extension

Chess guide for online live chess on chess.com.

The extension uses an advanced chess engine to suggest the best moves in real time — no button clicks required. Move suggestions are highlighted directly on the board tiles as you play.

Steps to get started:
• Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store.
• Visit https://chessonsteroids.com/ and sign in with your Google account.
• Start your 3 free trial games — no credit card required.
• Subscribe to unlock unlimited games and all engine levels.

Premium members can choose between 3 engine levels:
• Beginner  — under 1500 rating strength
• Intermediate — around 2000 rating strength
• Advanced — GM level strength

The engine has been programmed to play like a human, making its suggestions natural and instructive — ideal for learning patterns and improving your chess instincts over time.

Features:
• Works on all live chess game types on chess.com.
• Move suggestions appear as highlighted tiles on the board — no separate window needed.
• Also works in spectator mode — great for studying strong players' games.
• Adjustable engine strength for players of all levels.
• Runs entirely in your browser — no external server calls for move calculations.

Support:
Questions or issues? Email snoqualmiesolutions@gmail.com — replies within 1–2 business days.

Privacy Policy: https://chessonsteroids.com/privacy

webページ内でChatGPT（LLM）と会話することができます。webページの要約、質疑応答からはじまり、さまざまなことが可能です。

quickthinkerはwebページを要約/質疑応答ができるChrome拡張機能です。
以下のようなメリットがあります。
・AIの要約機能: 最先端の言語モデル（LLM）を利用して、Webページの内容を瞬時に要約します。長い記事や論文も、クリック一つで要点を把握可能に。
・質問応答システム: 特定の情報を求める際、直接質問を入力することで、関連する回答を即座に提供。情報探索がより直感的かつ迅速に。
・インタラクティブな学習支援: 要約と質問応答を組み合わせることで、ユーザーはより深い理解と学習が可能。学習材料を効率的にナビゲートし、知識の吸収を促進。
・時間節約: 長文を読む時間を削減し、必要な情報にすぐアクセスできるため、調査や勉強の時間が大幅に短縮されます。

QuickThinkerでは、研究者、学生、専門家、または日々のブラウジングで時間を効率よく使いたいと考えている一般ユーザーに最適です。
Webページからの情報取得が効果的かつ生産的になります。

Virtual camera effects for video meetings. Loop videos, static images, or custom uploads as your camera feed.

Looped — Virtual Camera, On Your Terms
Looped replaces your webcam with a looping video, pre-recorded clip, or static image — giving you full control over what you share on camera, without interrupting your workflow.
What Looped does
🎥 Loop a recorded clip
Record a short video of yourself and set it to loop continuously. Stay visually present in a meeting while stepping away when you need to — without disruption.
📁 Use any video as your camera
Upload any pre-recorded video and use it as your live webcam feed. Ideal for repeatable presentations, consistent on-camera appearances, or simply putting your best footage forward.
🖼 Use a static image
Set a professional photo or branded image as your camera output. Simple, clean, and distraction-free.
🌍 Works across platforms
Looped works with any website or app that requests camera access — no extra configuration needed.
👀 Built for privacy
Everything runs entirely in your browser. No files are uploaded, no data leaves your device, and nothing is stored on external servers.

The key changes: removed the jokes and self-deprecating framing, led with utility over humor, and grounded the privacy section in factual language rather than distrust of competitors. Want me to tighten it further or adjust any section?
